data.name: Knockout Master 2
data.detailed_description:
In Knockout Master 2, you continue the story of a wealthy young man with a long-term goal of becoming the world heavyweight boxing champion.

Along the way, your decisions will shape the world and characters around you.

Many beautiful women populate the world of this game and your actions will change your story with them.

Don't get too comfortable. Dangerous criminals will try to spoil your plans and ruin your dreams.

Featuring:

  • High-quality renders and animations

  • 8 Love Interests

  • Multiple Endings

  • Unlockable Gallery

  • Smartphone (Text messages, Social media, News, and more!)

  • Unlockable Phone Wallpapers

  • Music & Sound effects

  • Ren'Py Engine
data.about_the_game:
In Knockout Master 2, you continue the story of a wealthy young man with a long-term goal of becoming the world heavyweight boxing champion.

Along the way, your decisions will shape the world and characters around you.

Many beautiful women populate the world of this game and your actions will change your story with them.

Don't get too comfortable. Dangerous criminals will try to spoil your plans and ruin your dreams.

Featuring:

  • 8 Love Interests

  • Unlockable Gallery

  • Smartphone (Text messages, Social media, News, and more!)

  • Unlockable Phone Wallpapers

  • Ren'Py Engine
data.short_description: Knockout Master 2 is a choice-driven adult visual novel where you continue your journey as a boxer aiming for the world heavyweight title. The game is packed with sex, romance, drama, and a rich story.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
